mapper.select: SELECT a.busiNo,a.busiNum,a.ownerName,a.busiTel,a.busiName,a.busiType1,a.busiType2,a.busiType3,a.storeTel,a.storeAddr,a.storeAddrDetail,a.agreeYn,a.state,a.regDate,a.modDate,a.delDate,a.deleteYn ,a.title,a.homePage,a.introduce,b.busiFileNo,b.busiStoredFileName FROM busi a INNER JOIN busifile b ON a.busiNo= b.busiNo WHERE 1=1 AND a.writer =#{writer} AND a.deleteYn ='N' AND b.deleteYn ='N'
mapper.update: UPDATE busiFile SET modDate=now(),delDate=now(), deleteYn='Y' where busiFileNo = #{busiFileNo}
UPDATE busi SET modDate =now() ,delDate = now() , deleteYN='Y' where busiNo = #{busiNo}
mapper.select: SELECT fileNo,busiNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,writer,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM storeFile WHERE busiNo=#{busiNo} AND deleteYn='N'
mapper.update: UPDATE storeFile set deleteYn='Y', modDate =now() ,delDate =now() WHERE busiNo=#{busiNo}
UPDATE storeFile set deleteYn='Y' , modDate =now() ,delDate =now() WHERE fileNo=#{fileNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT into menu (busiNo,name,price,count,content,deleveryYn,deleveryPrice,regDate) values ( (SELECT IFNULL(max(busiNo),1)FROM busi) ,#{name},#{price},#{count},#{content},#{deleveryYn},#{deleveryPrice},now())
mapper.select: SELECT a.menuNo,a.busiNo,a.name,a.price,a.count,a.content,a.deleveryYn,a.deleveryPrice,a.regDate,a.modDate,a.delDate,a.deleteYn ,b.fileNo,b.menuNo,b.originFileName,b.storedFileName,b.fileSize,b.fileSize,b.writer,b.regDate,b.modDate,b.delDate,b.deleteYn FROM menu a INNER JOIN menufile b ON a.menuNo = b.menuNo WHERE busiNo = #{busiNo} and a.deleteYn='N' and b.deleteYn='N'
mapper.update: UPDATE menuFile set deleteYn='Y' , delDate=now() WHERE fileNo = #{fileNo}
UPDATE menu SET deleteYn='Y' , delDate = now() WHERE busiNo=#{busiNo}
UPDATE menufile SET deleteYn = 'Y' ,delDate =now() WHERE menuNo BETWEEN ( SELECT MIN(menuNo) FROM menu WHERE busiNo=#{busiNo}) AND ( SELECT MAX(menuNo) FROM menu WHERE busiNo=#{busiNo})
mapper.insert: Insert into jobFile(jobNo,writer,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize) values ( ( SELECT IFNULL(max(jobNo),1) From job ) ,#{writer},#{originFileName},#{storedFileName},#{fileSize})
mapper.select: SELECT jobNo,jobWriter,jobCompany,jobTitle,jobType,jobMoney,jobLoc,jobLocDetail,jobWorkDate,jobWorkTime,jobLocContent,jobContent ,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM job WHERE jobWriter = #{writer} AND deleteYn ='N'
SELECT fileNo,jobNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM jobFile WHERE jobNo=#{jobNo} AND deleteYn ='N'
mapper.update: UPDATE jobFile SET deleteYn='Y',modDate =now() WHERE fileNo=#{fileNo}
UPDATE job SET deleteYn ='Y',delDate =now() WHERE jobNo =#{jobNo}
UPDATE jobFile set deleteYn='Y',delDate =now() WHERE jobNo=#{jobNo}
mapper.select: SELECT count(menuNo) FROM menu WHERE busiNo =#{busiNo} AND deleteYN='N'
SELECT count(jobNo) FROM job WHERE jobWriter =#{writer} AND deleteYN='N'
